company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver Human Resources Center federation exclusively handles senior (60+) part-time/temporary light work (高年齢者/臨時的短期業務), not headhunting
notes: Official site webc.sjc.ne.jp/doushiren/ confirmed with matching company name and Sapporo HQ address. Contact web form found at inquiry_1 page; no public email published. MHLW page confirms scope: elderly job seekers for temporary light work.
